languages.text: "Сдается мне, ксенос давно не проверял свою коллекцию самолично..." {n}Абеляр ухмыляется в усы, явно довольный тем, что поймал врага Человечества на ротозействе.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Сдается мне, ксенос давно не проверял свою коллекцию самолично..." {n}Абеляр ухмыляется в усы, явно довольный тем, что поймал врага Человечества на ротозействе.{/n}

languages.text: "It appears the xenos has not personally checked his collection in some time..." {n}Abelard grins into his moustache, visibly pleased that he has caught the enemy of Humanity in this oversight.{/n}

"It appears the xenos has not personally checked his collection in some time..." {n}Abelard grins into his moustache, visibly pleased that he has caught the enemy of Humanity in this oversight.{/n}

languages.text: “看来那异形有段时间没亲自清点他的收藏了……”{n}阿贝拉德咧嘴一笑，胡须也跟着动了动，显然为抓到人类之敌的疏漏而感到得意。{/n}
languages.original_text: "It appears the xenos has not personally checked his collection in some time..." {n}Abelard grins into his moustache, visibly pleased that he has caught the enemy of Humanity in this oversight.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “看来那异形有段时间没亲自清点他的收藏了……”{n}阿贝拉德咧嘴一笑，胡须也跟着动了动，显然为抓到人类之敌的疏漏而感到得意。{/n}

languages.text: «Parece que el xenos lleva un tiempo sin visitar su colección...». {n}Abelard sonríe, visiblemente contento por haber descubierto el descuido de un enemigo de la Humanidad.{/n}
languages.original_text: "It appears the xenos has not personally checked his collection in some time..." {n}Abelard grins into his moustache, visibly pleased that he has caught the enemy of Humanity in this oversight.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Parece que el xenos lleva un tiempo sin visitar su colección...». {n}Abelard sonríe, visiblemente contento por haber descubierto el descuido de un enemigo de la Humanidad.{/n}

languages.text: « Il semble que le xénos ne soit pas venu inspecter sa collection depuis un bon moment... » {n}Abélard sourit dans sa moustache, visiblement satisfait d'avoir pris l'ennemi de l'humanité en flagrant délit de négligence.{/n}
languages.original_text: "It appears the xenos has not personally checked his collection in some time..." {n}Abelard grins into his moustache, visibly pleased that he has caught the enemy of Humanity in this oversight.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Il semble que le xénos ne soit pas venu inspecter sa collection depuis un bon moment... » {n}Abélard sourit dans sa moustache, visiblement satisfait d'avoir pris l'ennemi de l'humanité en flagrant délit de négligence.{/n}

languages.text: "Görünüşe göre zeno, bir süredir koleksiyonunu şahsen kontrol etmemiş..." {n}Abelard, bıyık altından gülümsüyor. İnsanlığın düşmanının dikkatsizliğini yakalamış olmaktan epey memnun kalıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "It appears the xenos has not personally checked his collection in some time..." {n}Abelard grins into his moustache, visibly pleased that he has caught the enemy of Humanity in this oversight.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Görünüşe göre zeno, bir süredir koleksiyonunu şahsen kontrol etmemiş..." {n}Abelard, bıyık altından gülümsüyor. İnsanlığın düşmanının dikkatsizliğini yakalamış olmaktan epey memnun kalıyor.{/n}

languages.text: "Offenbar hat der Xenos seine Sammlung länger nicht persönlich inspiziert ..." {n}Abelard grinst in seinen Bart und ist sichtlich erfreut, den Feind der Menschheit gefasst zu haben.{/n}
languages.original_text: "It appears the xenos has not personally checked his collection in some time..." {n}Abelard grins into his moustache, visibly pleased that he has caught the enemy of Humanity in this oversight.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Offenbar hat der Xenos seine Sammlung länger nicht persönlich inspiziert ..." {n}Abelard grinst in seinen Bart und ist sichtlich erfreut, den Feind der Menschheit gefasst zu haben.{/n}

languages.text: 「この異形生物はコレクションを自分で確認していないようだ…」{n}アベルは髭を撫でながら、人類の敵がこの過失を犯したことに満足げに笑った。{/n}
